D:\Documents\stm32\arm_gnu\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -T D:/Documents/stm32/open_Source/githubRepo/mlkem-bench/STM32F411RETX_FLASH.ld -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Startup/startup_stm32f411retx.s.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/acvp_vectors.c.obj "CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/aes-encrypt.S.obj" "CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/aes-keyschedule.S.obj" "CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/aes-publicinputs.S.obj" CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/cbd.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/cmov_int16.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/crypto_hashblocks_sha512_inner32.s.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/fastaddsub.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/fastbasemul.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/fastinvntt.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/fastntt.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/fips202.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/indcpa.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/keccakf1600.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/kem.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/matacc.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/matacc_asm.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/ntt.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/poly.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/poly_asm.S.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/polyvec.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/randombytes.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/reduce.S.obj "CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/symmetric-fips202.c.obj" CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/mlkem_stm32.dir/Src/verify.c.obj -o mlkem_stm32.elf
